message:
feat(abi): major pthread expansion, refine malloc and signal ABIs

- pthread_abi.rs: major expansion of POSIX threading ABI with additional
  mutex, condition variable, rwlock, and thread attribute operations for
  broader libc thread management compatibility (+182 lines)
- malloc_abi.rs: refine memory allocation ABI edge cases and alignment
  handling
- signal_abi.rs: restructure signal dispatch and improve sigset
  manipulation correctness
- string_abi.rs: expand string operations ABI surface
- Expand pthread ABI test coverage
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
